query:
SELECT id, name, status, 
  CASE WHEN actionPlansData IS NULL THEN 'sem_plano' ELSE 'tem_plano' END as plano_status,
  CASE WHEN riskMatricesData IS NULL THEN 'sem_matriz' ELSE 'tem_matriz' END as matriz_status
FROM projects 
WHERE status = 'matriz_riscos' AND actionPlansData IS NULL
LIMIT 5;

  CASE WHEN actionPlansData IS NULL THEN 'sem_plano' ELSE 'tem_plano' END as plano_status,
  CASE WHEN riskMatricesData IS NULL THEN 'sem_matriz' ELSE 'tem_matriz' END as matriz_status
FROM projects 
WHERE status = 'matriz_riscos' AND actionPlansData IS NULL
LIMIT 5;
